# Domain Nonresponsibilities

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerruntimeresponsibilitydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to runtime responsibility](../runtime-responsibility.md)

Provider runtime is an adapter boundary, not the domain system of record.

- It does not append canonical IR events or own the task event log envelope.
- It does not create or update ProviderCapability; it consumes capability data and computes local compatibility evidence.
- It does not lease tasks, heartbeat assignments, write workdir config as policy, or judge validation outcomes.

Those responsibilities stay in contracts, scheduling, policy, and control-plane layers.
